title: Cryptantha macrocalyx
taxonomy: Cryptantha macrocalyx belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is a species of flowering plant within the genus Cryptantha. Cryptantha macrocalyx is native to North America, specifically in the southwestern region of the United States. The plant is further classified into the order Boraginales and class Magnoliopsida. Cryptantha macrocalyx is also known to be a perennial herb.
